sections.title: The Teacher and pupil on Ground Floor

lines.speaker: Teacher
lines.text: Stop pulling, we've plenty of time to see everything.

lines.speaker: Pupil
lines.text: Aww, but miss, it's sooo exciting.

sections.title: The Teacher and pupil on the 2nd Floor

lines.speaker: Pupil
lines.text: That man over there talks funny, miss.

lines.speaker: Teacher
lines.text: That's because he's an art critic, dear. They have some very funny ideas.
